typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		{PLHIS Contact} as string,
		Notes as string,
		Ramservername as string,
		Lcmstatus as string,
		TCOOStatus as string,
		TCOOMigrationStatus as string,
		Primarytechmgr as string,
		Managedbygroup as string,
		Environment as string,
		Cio as string,
		Ciodirect as string,
		Cistatus as string,
		Rtstatus as string,
		Rtplannedactivity as string,
		Fundingdate as string,
		Rtdecomdate as string,
		Rtplancertifieddate as string,
		Hweoldate as string,
		Applicationids as string,
		Normalizedos as string,
		{Eol Hw Thru 2023} as string,
		{Hds Thru 2022} as string,
		Cioname as string,
		{Vm On Hds2022 Esx Depthru 2023} as string,
		Productname as string,
		{Hds Thru 2023} as string,
		{Hds Thru 2024} as string,
		MappedCIODirName as string,
		Primaryapplication as string,
		{TCOO Extension Aggregated} as string,
		SourceCIODirName as string,
		UpdateDate as string,
		Import_date as string,
		PAA_INDICATOR as string,
		PAI_INDICATOR as string,
		ChangeNumber as string,
		Decom_Date as string,
		Extension_Date as string,
		ISPNumber as string,
		DATA_CENTER_NAME as string,
		{Target Data Center} as string,
		{Target VM} as string,
		{Norm Site} as string,
		{Current VM} as string,
		JiraNumber as string,
		TCOOPlanningDecomDT as string,
		DecomYEAR as string,
		DecomQTR as string,
		DecomMO as string,
		RTYEAR as string,
		RTMO as string,
		TPDecomYr as string,
		TPDecomQTR as string,
		TPDecomMO as string,
		RTQtr as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false) ~> ExportFormat	source(output(
		ID as integer,
		{PLHIS Contact} as string,
		Ramservername as string,
		Lcmstatus as string,
		TCOOStatus as string,
		TCOOMigrationStatus as string,
		{TCOO Extension Aggregated} as string,
		Notes as string,
		ChangeNumber as string,
		Decom_Date as timestamp,
		Extension_Date as timestamp,
		Ciodirectname as string,
		Primarytechmgr as string,
		Managedbygroup as string,
		Primaryapplication as string,
		Environment as string,
		Applicationids as string,
		Cistatus as string,
		Rtstatus as string,
		Rtplannedactivity as string,
		Fundingdate as string,
		Rtdecomdate as string,
		Rtplancertifieddate as string,
		Hweoldate as string,
		Normalizedos as string,
		{Eol Hw Thru 2023} as string,
		{Hds Thru 2022} as string,
		Cioname as string,
		{Vm On Hds2022 Esx Depthru 2023} as string,
		Productname as string,
		{Hds Thru 2023} as string,
		{Hds Thru 2024} as string,
		Cio as string,
		Ciodirect as string,
		ISPNumber as string,
		JiraNumber as string,
		TCOOPlanningDecomDT as date,
		Import_date as date
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'select * from dbo.tbl_LCM_PrevWeek_ScopeTracker_dev',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LookupLKPTABLE
ExportFormat derive(Import_date = toDate(toString(currentTimestamp(), 'MM/dd/yyyy'), "MM/dd/yyyy"),
		DecomDT = toDate(toString(Decom_Date, 'MM/dd/yyyy'), "MM/dd/yyyy"),
		ExtDT = toDate(toString(Extension_Date, 'MM/dd/yyyy'), "MM/dd/yyyy"),
		TCPLDT = toDate(toString(TCOOPlanningDecomDT, 'MM/dd/yyyy'), "MM/dd/yyyy"),
		Ramservername = upper(Ramservername)) ~> DerivedColumn
DerivedColumn,LookupLKPTABLE lookup(DerivedColumn@Ramservername == LookupLKPTABLE@Ramservername,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> Lookup
DerivedColumn sink(input(
		TCOOMigrationStatus as string,
		Applicationids as string,
		sourceCIOdirName as string,
		Cioname as string,
		Eol_Hw_Thru_2023 as string,
		Primarytechmgr as string,
		Rtdecomdate as string,
		Primary_Applicatioin as string,
		Ramservername as string,
		Lcmstatus as string,
		Cistatus as string,
		Normalizedos as string,
		PLHIS_Contact as string,
		Rtstatus as string,
		Productname as string,
		Hds_Thru_2023 as string,
		Hds_Thru_2022 as string,
		TCOO_Extension_Aggregated as string,
		Import_date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		Extension_Date as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		Notes as string,
		TCOOStatus as string,
		Rtplannedactivity as string,
		NewSourceLCM_AsOf as string,
		Cio as string,
		Decom_Date as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		Hds_Thru_2024 as string,
		Ciodirectname as string,
		Hweoldate as string,
		Ciodirect as string,
		TCOOPlanningDecomDT as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		Rtplancertifieddate as string,
		PLHIS_Updated_Date as string,
		ChangeNumber as string,
		Environment as string,
		ISPNumber as string,
		JiraNumber as string,
		Vm_On_Hds2022_Esx_Depthru_2023 as string,
		Managedbygroup as string,
		Fundingdate as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		TCOOMigrationStatus,
		Applicationids,
		sourceCIOdirName = SourceCIODirName,
		Cioname,
		Eol_Hw_Thru_2023 = {Eol Hw Thru 2023},
		Primarytechmgr,
		Rtdecomdate,
		Primary_Applicatioin = Primaryapplication,
		Ramservername,
		Lcmstatus,
		Cistatus,
		Normalizedos,
		PLHIS_Contact = {PLHIS Contact},
		Rtstatus,
		Productname,
		Hds_Thru_2023 = {Hds Thru 2023},
		Hds_Thru_2022 = {Hds Thru 2022},
		TCOO_Extension_Aggregated = {TCOO Extension Aggregated},
		Import_date,
		Extension_Date = ExtDT,
		Notes,
		TCOOStatus,
		Rtplannedactivity,
		NewSourceLCM_AsOf = Import_date,
		Cio,
		Decom_Date = DecomDT,
		Hds_Thru_2024 = {Hds Thru 2024},
		Ciodirectname = MappedCIODirName,
		Hweoldate,
		Ciodirect,
		TCOOPlanningDecomDT = TCPLDT,
		Rtplancertifieddate,
		PLHIS_Updated_Date = UpdateDate,
		ChangeNumber,
		Environment,
		ISPNumber,
		JiraNumber,
		Vm_On_Hds2022_Esx_Depthru_2023 = {Vm On Hds2022 Esx Depthru 2023},
		Managedbygroup,
		Fundingdate)) ~> OLEDBDestination
Lookup select(mapColumn(
		Import_date = LookupLKPTABLE@Import_date,
		DecomDT = DecomDT,
		ExtDT = ExtDT,
		TCPLDT = TCPLDT,
		{PLHIS Contact} = LookupLKPTABLE@{PLHIS Contact},
		Notes = LookupLKPTABLE@Notes,
		Ramservername = LookupLKPTABLE@Ramservername,
		Lcmstatus = LookupLKPTABLE@Lcmstatus,
		TCOOStatus = LookupLKPTABLE@TCOOStatus,
		TCOOMigrationStatus = LookupLKPTABLE@TCOOMigrationStatus,
		Primarytechmgr = LookupLKPTABLE@Primarytechmgr,
		Managedbygroup = LookupLKPTABLE@Managedbygroup,
		Environment = LookupLKPTABLE@Environment,
		Cio = LookupLKPTABLE@Cio,
		Ciodirect = LookupLKPTABLE@Ciodirect,
		Cistatus = LookupLKPTABLE@Cistatus,
		Rtstatus = LookupLKPTABLE@Rtstatus,
		Rtplannedactivity = LookupLKPTABLE@Rtplannedactivity,
		Fundingdate = LookupLKPTABLE@Fundingdate,
		Rtdecomdate = LookupLKPTABLE@Rtdecomdate,
		Rtplancertifieddate = LookupLKPTABLE@Rtplancertifieddate,
		Hweoldate = LookupLKPTABLE@Hweoldate,
		Applicationids = LookupLKPTABLE@Applicationids,
		Normalizedos = LookupLKPTABLE@Normalizedos,
		{Eol Hw Thru 2023} = LookupLKPTABLE@{Eol Hw Thru 2023},
		{Hds Thru 2022} = LookupLKPTABLE@{Hds Thru 2022},
		Cioname = LookupLKPTABLE@Cioname,
		{Vm On Hds2022 Esx Depthru 2023} = LookupLKPTABLE@{Vm On Hds2022 Esx Depthru 2023},
		Productname = LookupLKPTABLE@Productname,
		{Hds Thru 2023} = LookupLKPTABLE@{Hds Thru 2023},
		{Hds Thru 2024} = LookupLKPTABLE@{Hds Thru 2024},
		MappedCIODirName = MappedCIODirName,
		Primaryapplication = LookupLKPTABLE@Primaryapplication,
		{TCOO Extension Aggregated} = LookupLKPTABLE@{TCOO Extension Aggregated},
		SourceCIODirName = SourceCIODirName,
		UpdateDate = UpdateDate,
		PAA_INDICATOR = PAA_INDICATOR,
		PAI_INDICATOR = PAI_INDICATOR,
		ChangeNumber = LookupLKPTABLE@ChangeNumber,
		Decom_Date = LookupLKPTABLE@Decom_Date,
		Extension_Date = LookupLKPTABLE@Extension_Date,
		ISPNumber = LookupLKPTABLE@ISPNumber,
		DATA_CENTER_NAME = DATA_CENTER_NAME,
		{Target Data Center} = {Target Data Center},
		{Target VM} = {Target VM},
		{Norm Site} = {Norm Site},
		{Current VM} = {Current VM},
		JiraNumber = LookupLKPTABLE@JiraNumber,
		TCOOPlanningDecomDT = LookupLKPTABLE@TCOOPlanningDecomDT,
		DecomYEAR = DecomYEAR,
		DecomQTR = DecomQTR,
		DecomMO = DecomMO,
		RTYEAR = RTYEAR,
		RTMO = RTMO,
		TPDecomYr = TPDecomYr,
		TPDecomQTR = TPDecomQTR,
		TPDecomMO = TPDecomMO,
		RTQtr = RTQtr,
		{} = {},
		ID = ID,
		Ciodirectname = Ciodirectname
	),
	 skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	 skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> LookupSelect
LookupSelect filter(!isMatch()) ~> FilterLookup
FilterLookup sink(input(
		TCOOMigrationStatus as string,
		Applicationids as string,
		Cioname as string,
		Eol_Hw_Thru_2023 as string,
		Primarytechmgr as string,
		Rtdecomdate as string,
		Ramservername as string,
		Lcmstatus as string,
		Cistatus as string,
		Normalizedos as string,
		PLHIS_Contact as string,
		Rtstatus as string,
		Productname as string,
		Hds_Thru_2023 as string,
		Hds_Thru_2022 as string,
		Primaryapplication as string,
		TCOO_Extension_Aggregated as string,
		Import_date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		Extension_Date as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		Notes as string,
		TCOOStatus as string,
		Rtplannedactivity as string,
		Cio as string,
		Decom_Date as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		Hds_Thru_2024 as string,
		Ciodirectname as string,
		Hweoldate as string,
		Ciodirect as string,
		TCOOPlanningDecomDT as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		Rtplancertifieddate as string,
		ChangeNumber as string,
		Environment as string,
		ISPNumber as string,
		JiraNumber as string,
		Vm_On_Hds2022_Esx_Depthru_2023 as string,
		Managedbygroup as string,
		Fundingdate as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		TCOOMigrationStatus,
		Applicationids,
		Cioname,
		Eol_Hw_Thru_2023 = {Eol Hw Thru 2023},
		Primarytechmgr,
		Rtdecomdate,
		Ramservername,
		Lcmstatus,
		Cistatus,
		Normalizedos,
		PLHIS_Contact = {PLHIS Contact},
		Rtstatus,
		Productname,
		Hds_Thru_2023 = {Hds Thru 2023},
		Hds_Thru_2022 = {Hds Thru 2022},
		Primaryapplication,
		TCOO_Extension_Aggregated = {TCOO Extension Aggregated},
		Import_date,
		Extension_Date = ExtDT,
		Notes,
		TCOOStatus,
		Rtplannedactivity,
		Cio,
		Decom_Date = DecomDT,
		Hds_Thru_2024 = {Hds Thru 2024},
		Ciodirectname = MappedCIODirName,
		Hweoldate,
		Ciodirect,
		TCOOPlanningDecomDT = TCPLDT,
		Rtplancertifieddate,
		ChangeNumber,
		Environment,
		ISPNumber,
		JiraNumber,
		Vm_On_Hds2022_Esx_Depthru_2023 = {Vm On Hds2022 Esx Depthru 2023},
		Managedbygroup,
		Fundingdate)) ~> OLEDBDestination1
